Https.// Enabled: Serve over TLS. Off keeps the proven HTTP-only binding above. When on, Kestrel binds HttpPort (HTTP, kept on so existing clients keep working) and HttpsPort (TLS). A self-signed cert is auto-generated for this host and stored in the machine cert store — distribute its public cert to clients' Trusted Root, or set PfxPath/PfxPassword to use your own. Set HttpPort to 0 to drop HTTP once all clients are on HTTPS.

Client.// InstallerPath: Absolute or content-root-relative path to the tray installer the /download/client endpoint serves. Blank uses 'client/OpenPrintDeploy.Client.Installer.exe' next to the server exe (where Publish-Server.ps1 puts it).

Updates.// GitHubRepo: owner/repo whose latest GitHub release the admin 'Check for updates' button compares against. Blank disables the check.
